maps.title: MAP: Be Bank of India (Housing
maps.objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025

tasks.title: Assess current state against: Be Bank of India (Housing
tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be Bank of India (Housing'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: These directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Housing Finance
Companies) Directions, 2025.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Be Bank of India (Housing
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (housing finance companies) directions, 2025. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be Bank of India (Housing
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be Bank of India (Housing'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be Bank of India (Housing
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be Bank of India (Housing' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be Bank of India (Housing
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be Bank of India (Housing'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

outsourcing arrangement) across

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Apply products and services, whether
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to apply to all the products and services, whether they are provided by the hfc, its subsidiaries or digital lending platforms (self-owned and/or under a. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Apply products and services, whether
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Apply products and services, whether'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Apply products and services, whethe
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Apply products and services, whether' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Apply products and services, w
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Apply products and services, whether'. tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Transparently borrower all the following'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Prepare and submit regulatory report: Transparently borrower all the following
tasks.description: Prepare the regulatory report required under 'Transparently borrower all the following'. Ensure the report format complies with RBI prescribed templates (XBRL, CIMS, or prescribed return format as applicable). Have the report reviewed and signed by the authorised signatory before submission. Retain a copy of the submitted report and the submission acknowledgement receipt.
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed submission copy and RBI/regulator acknowledgement receipt
tasks.implementation_notes: Late submission attracts regulatory penalty. Set submission reminder 7 days before deadline.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Transparently borrower all the following

tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: The HFC shall adopt the following guidelines for engaging Recovery Agents:
(1) The HFC, as principal, shall be responsible for the action of their agents.

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Adopt for engaging Recovery Agents:' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Adopt for engaging Recovery Ag

tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Adopt by the National Disaster
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Adopt by the National Disaster'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Adopt by the National Disaster
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Adopt by the National Disaster' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Adopt by the National Disaster
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Adopt by the National Disaster'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Pay approval of NHB'. Document the existing Procedure posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: However, HFCs may pay interest with prior approval of NHB, when impact of
such payment may result in net loss or increase the net loss, provided CRAR
remains above the regulatory norm.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Pay approval of NHB
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to pay interest with prior approval of nhb. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Pay approval of NHB
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Pay approval of NHB'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Pay approval of NHB
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Pay approval of NHB' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Pay approval of NHB
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Pay approval of NHB'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.description: Conduct a current-state gap assessment to determine the extent to which the organisation currently satisfies the requirement for 'Be following aspects while formulating'. Document the existing Policy posture, identify gaps, and record findings as a Gap Assessment Report.
tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: HFCs shall be guided by the
following aspects while formulating a policy on valuation of properties and appointment
of valuers:

tasks.title: Draft or update policy for: Be following aspects while formulating
tasks.description: Draft or update the internal policy document to formally mandate 'Be following aspects while formulating'. The policy must reference the applicable RBI Master Direction, define scope, roles & responsibilities, and set measurable compliance thresholds. Circulate draft to all candidate departments for review comments.
tasks.expected_evidence: Draft policy document in PDF format with version number and author
tasks.implementation_notes: Include specific RBI circular reference and effective date clause.

tasks.title: Obtain Board/Management approval for policy: Be following aspects while formulating
tasks.description: Present the drafted policy for 'Be following aspects while formulating' to the Board or Senior Management for formal ratification. Record approval in the Board/Committee meeting minutes. Ensure the approved policy is version-controlled and stored in the policy repository.
tasks.expected_evidence: Board resolution or Committee minutes referencing policy approval
tasks.implementation_notes: Approval must be captured in formal minutes, not email.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Be following aspects while formulating
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Be following aspects while formulating'. Required evidence types: Approved Policy Document. Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Approved Policy Document
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Be following aspects while formulat
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Be following aspects while formulating' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Policy Review. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Be following aspects while for
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Be following aspects while formulating'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.

tasks.expected_evidence: Completed Gap Assessment Report signed by Department Head
tasks.implementation_notes:
Review control description: HFCs shall prescribe a minimum qualification and minimum post qualification
experience for empanelment of valuers.

tasks.title: Implement technical control: Prescribe and minimum post qualification
tasks.description: Execute the technical implementation as specified: Implement operational procedure to prescribe a minimum qualification and minimum post qualification experience for empanelment of valuers. Configuration changes must be applied on all applicable systems in the environment (development, staging, and production). All changes must be tracked in the Change Management Register with a Change Ticket.
tasks.expected_evidence: Change Management Record with system configuration screenshot or export
tasks.implementation_notes: Before applying, take a baseline snapshot of current configuration. Apply change during a pre-approved maintenance window.

tasks.title: Collect and archive compliance evidence: Prescribe and minimum post qualification
tasks.description: Formally collect all evidence artifacts generated during the implementation of 'Prescribe and minimum post qualification'. Required evidence types: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP). Evidence must be labelled with document name, version, date, and responsible officer. Upload to the compliance evidence management system with a retention label.
tasks.expected_evidence: All required evidence items: Standard Operating Procedure (SOP)
tasks.implementation_notes: Evidence must be stored with minimum 5-year retention.

tasks.title: Independent verification by Internal Audit: Prescribe and minimum post qualific
tasks.description: Internal Audit must independently verify that 'Prescribe and minimum post qualification' is effectively implemented and that the evidence provided is authentic and sufficient. Verification method: Manual Audit. Internal Audit must NOT rely solely on evidence submitted by the implementing department. Perform independent spot-checks or automated configuration queries. Issue an Audit Verification Certificate upon satisfactory completion.
tasks.expected_evidence: Independent Audit Verification Certificate signed by Chief Audit Officer
tasks.implementation_notes: This is an independent gate task. The MAP cannot close until this task is COMPLETED. Auditors should not accept evidence uploaded by the same team that implemented the control.

tasks.title: Compliance Officer sign-off and MAP closure: Prescribe and minimum post qua
tasks.description: The Compliance Officer must review all completed tasks, evidence artifacts, and the Internal Audit Verification Certificate for 'Prescribe and minimum post qualification'. If all tasks pass review, the Compliance Officer formally attests that the control is operationally satisfied. Update the Compliance Register. Mark the MAP as COMPLETED. Notify RBI-liaison team if a regulatory reporting obligation is attached.
tasks.deliverable: Signed Compliance Attestation and Updated Compliance Register
tasks.expected_evidence: Signed Compliance Attestation letter and Compliance Register entry
tasks.implementation_notes: This is the final gate task. MAP status becomes COMPLETED after this task closes.
